executives.name: Lisa Bahash
executives.background: Lisa Bahash has over 30 years of experience in the automotive and materials sectors. She has held senior executive roles at JCI and Ride Control, LLC, and has expertise in manufacturing, supply chain, and strategic growth.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Automotive and Transportation
